title: fractal-pv-coupling: Code, manuscript source, and replication materials
description: Python package, LaTeX manuscript source, and replication scripts for the paper "Temporal Fractal Coupling of Volatility and Trading Volume: A Robust Pattern Without Forecast Power in S&P 500 Stocks, 2015-2026". Reproduces all results in the paper from Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data using detrended fluctuation analysis, rolling Hurst exponents, the Coupling Intensity Index, and a battery of cluster-robust panel regressions including Bell-McCaffrey CR2 with Satterthwaite degrees of freedom and the wild cluster restricted bootstrap.
